title: senecio pellucidus
intro: Senecio pellucidus, also known as Clearweed or Pellucid Ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a bitter tonic and an expectorant, helping to relieve coughs and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio pellucidus include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Senecio pellucidus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
